title: Confluence Space
description: Schema for a Confluence Cloud space resource as returned by the REST API v2. A space is the top-level organizational container in Confluence, holding pages, blog posts, and other content.

id.description: The unique identifier of the space.

key.description: The unique key of the space. Used in URLs and as a human-readable identifier. Must be alphanumeric and uppercase.

name.description: The display name of the space.

type.description: The type of space. Global spaces are accessible to all users; personal spaces belong to an individual user.

status.description: The lifecycle status of the space.

authorId.description: The Atlassian account ID of the user who created the space.

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 date-time when the space was created.

homepageId.description: The ID of the space homepage. Every space has a homepage that serves as the root of the page tree.

SpaceDescription.title: Space Description
SpaceDescription.description: The description of the space in available representation formats.

plain.description: The plain text representation of the space description.

view.description: The rendered HTML view of the space description.

SpaceIcon.title: Space Icon
SpaceIcon.description: The icon associated with the space.

path.description: The relative path to the space icon image.

apiDownloadLink.description: The API download link for the space icon.

representation.description: The name of this representation format.

value.description: The content in this representation format.

Label.title: Label
Label.description: A label used to categorize and organize content.

id.description: The unique identifier of the label.

name.description: The display name of the label.

prefix.description: The prefix indicating the label scope.

SpaceProperty.title: Space Property
SpaceProperty.description: A key-value property stored on a space for custom metadata.

id.description: The unique identifier of the property.

value.description: The value of the property. Can be any valid JSON value.

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 date-time when this version was created.

message.description: An optional message describing the changes in this version.

minorEdit.description: Whether this version was a minor edit.

authorId.description: The Atlassian account ID of the user who created this version.

Operation.title: Operation
Operation.description: An operation that can be performed on a space.

targetType.description: The target type for the operation.

SpacePermission.title: Space Permission
SpacePermission.description: A permission entry controlling access to the space.

id.description: The unique identifier of the permission entry.

principal.description: The user, group, or role that this permission applies to.

SpaceLinks.title: Space Links
SpaceLinks.description: Hypermedia links associated with the space.

webui.description: Relative path to view the space in the Confluence web UI.

PaginationLinks.title: Pagination Links
PaginationLinks.description: Links for cursor-based pagination through result sets.

next.description: URL for the next page of results.

base.description: The base URL of the Confluence instance.
